reviews.comment:
MUY mala exp, lean antes de ir. Como socia del ACA fui a YPF boxes de este lugar. Tengo una camioneta con VTV vigente a la que se le diagnosticaron cosas inexistentes por un presupuesto de 6 millones de pesos: que no tenia embrague, que estaba frenada, practicamente que estaba inrrodable (VTV vigente hace un mes!) y había que hacerle frenos enteros, embrague, cambiar todas las bobinas y bujías. Fui con un familiar, que tambien es mecanico, pero no se lo dijimos. Al carear a Hernan con intenciones de llevarnos la camioneta, el jefe de taller, el tipo respondio súper agresivamente. Tuve que ponerle punto final yo. Nos llevamos la camioneta a otro lado. Le diagnosticaron falla modulo ABS, un sensor roto en una rueda y 1 bujía en falla que la ponía en tres cilindros. Mañana esta lista. NO VAYAN si estan dudando!
Actualizo: arregle la camio en Bosch. Cambiaron módulo ABS. Se ponía en 3 cilindros x la falla de una sola bujía (igual le cambie todas x mantenimiento) y se frenaba una sola rueda x un sensor roto de asistencia en pendiente.
Está tan frenada la camioneta y TAN detonado el embrague que pude irme 100 km en perfectas condiciones hasta Luján sin ninguna luz encendida en el tablero y el ruido solamente de la música :)
LA-DRO-NES!!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
VERY bad experience, read before you go. As a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), I went to the YPF service center at this location. I have a pickup truck with a valid vehicle inspection certificate (VTV) that they diagnosed with nonexistent problems for a quote of 6 million pesos: that it didn't have a clutch, that the brakes were stuck, that it was practically undrivable (the VTV was valid for a month!), and that it needed a complete brake overhaul, clutch replacement, and all the ignition coils and spark plugs replaced. I went with a relative, who is also a mechanic, but we didn't tell him. When we confronted Hernan, the head mechanic, about taking the truck, he responded extremely aggressively. I had to put a stop to it myself. We took the truck somewhere else. They diagnosed a faulty ABS module, a broken sensor on one of the wheels, and a faulty spark plug that was causing it to run on three cylinders. It will be ready tomorrow. DO NOT GO if you are unsure!

Update: I got the truck fixed at Bosch. They replaced the ABS module. It was running on 3 cylinders due to a single spark plug failure (I replaced them all as part of maintenance) and one wheel was braking because of a broken hill start assist sensor.
The truck was so badly braked and the clutch was SO worn out that I was able to drive 100 km in perfect condition to Luján with no warning lights on the dashboard and the only noise coming from the music :)
THIEVES!!!!!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oeE1rMXNNVzVLUmt4M1FsUktTbVkzTUhGalJuYxAB
